zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William St Omer於大約1277年出生在英國薩默塞特維林頓時，他的父親Thomas de St Omer43歲，母親Alice St Elizabeth39歲。他於大約1294年與Alice de Wellington在英國薩默塞特維林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1344年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可姆爾巴頓享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William St Omer于大约1277年出生在英国薩默塞特維林頓时，他的父亲Thomas de St Omer43岁，母亲Alice St Elizabeth39岁。他于大约1294年与Alice de Wellington在英国薩默塞特維林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1344年在英国英格兰諾福爾可姆爾巴頓享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Omer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William St Omer was born about 1277, in Wellington, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas de St Omer, was 43 and his mother, Alice St Elizabeth, was 39. He married Alice de Wellington about 1294, in Wellington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1344, in Mulbarton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William St Omer est né environ 1277, à Wellington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de St Omer, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice St Elizabeth, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Wellington environ 1294, à Wellington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1344, à Mulbarton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William St Omer um 1277 in Wellington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de St Omer 43 und seine Mutter Alice St Elizabeth 39. Er hat um 1294 in Wellington, Somerset, England Alice de Wellington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1344 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Mulbarton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William St Omer è nato il circa 1277 nel Wellington, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Thomas de St Omer, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Alice St Elizabeth, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Wellington circa 1294, nel Wellington, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1344, nel Mulbarton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William St Omerが約1277年にイギリスソメルセトウエリントンで生まれた時，父Thomas de St Omerは43歳，母Alice St Elizabethは39歳であった。約1294年にイギリスソメルセトウエリントンでAlice de Wellingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1344年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクムルバートンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William St Omer(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 서머세트 웰잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de St Omer(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice St Elizabeth(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1294년 영국 서머세트 웰잉턴에서 Alice de Wellington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뮐바턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William St Omer nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Wellington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de St Omer, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice St Elizabeth, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Wellington aproximadamente 1294, em Wellington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1344, em Mulbarton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William St Omer родился около 1277 г. в местности веллингтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de St Omer было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice St Elizabeth, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Wellington около 1294 г. в местности веллингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1344 г. в местности мулбартон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William St Omer nació aproximadamente 1277, en Wellington, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de St Omer, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Alice St Elizabeth, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alice de Wellington aproximadamente 1294, en Wellington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1344, en Mulbarton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
